full_text:
Zuo Ling 左靈
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zuo Ling (左靈). At Li Jue’s orders, with Jia Xu, restrained Emperor Xian. Slandered Duan Wei. Zuo Ling was affiliated with Li Jue and the Han Dynasty.
